reviews.review_text: Easy quick checking and friendly staff

Midnight a Monday night….   people at the camp sites have been playing a guitar all night and singing so loudly it can be heard at the other end of the park. There are kids running through the park yelling and screaming, play fighting and playing tag all night. I get that it’s school holidays, but this much disrespect this late at night on a weeknight is just disgusting behaviour.

We stayed in one of the glamping tent thingos, it was cute, very well appointed and clean. Bedding and linen are great. Staff at check-in were great but didn’t see them again.

Would have been amazing to see staff proactively stop the noise, there’s no way they can’t hear it as it’s adjacent to reception. We paid a premium for this site being this time of year, I can hear this noise at the other end of the park over the top of noise cancelling headphones. I found myself also laying here worried about our car parked in the allocated parking not near the site, concerned about any damage the kids may cause to it. Value for money on this stay - 0.

Come and stay here outside of school holidays when hopefully there are parents who know where their kids are at night and have taught them how to be respectful to others. The location itself can’t be beaten. It’s just not the right time of year or place to come if you’re looking to get a bit of sleep.
Beautiful park,the beach is gorgeous.  loved the washing machines you don't need coins you just tap,  and you get a text when the washing is done
Great locaton and very short walk to water and pool. Very friendly wildlife🕊

Goregeous park with lots of lovely big trees, saddled between a surf beach and a bay beach, which are approx 10min walk. Staff were lovely and very helpful. Facilities are great (camp kitchen, bathrooms, laundry, etc). The only faults were the mould in the showers and the fact the shop refuses to accept cash (card only). Overall 9/10.

Great location, powered sites, clean amenities, friendly staff.
Pool looks so nice, will swim soon.
Right next to the beach via a short walk from our site.
Great spot for families, clean and beautifully maintained park
A beautiful place to camp with amazing staff. Nothing was too much trouble, and the communication was excellent. Clean amenities and surrounds. I highly recommend this place!
It was a great place.  Very family and dog friendly. Clean and well kept

Clean and tidy park. Only 1 dump point right at back off park to far to carry toilet cassette especiallyif your site is at front of park like we were. Sent son to buy ice creams at office, they only accept card not cash .beach walking distance .carnt comment on amenities as we had our own other wise a nice spot
I really enjoy this place .. tiny house is immaculate and just a short hop to the beach

We stayed in a Tiny House cabin. I had read previous reviews regarding storage in the bedroom,  so we packed light, only bringing essentials. The hanging space is the size of a broom cupboard and was the storage space for the broom and ironing board.

Considering there was two of us, there wasn't too much room to store what we brought..

The kitchen, in the cabin was good, there is an upside down refrigerator bigger than a mini fridge. The refrigerator section is below the freezer.

The positioning of the toilet in the bathroom wasn't good. I have recently had a hip replacement and there wasn't much room to move off the toilet between basin.

Initially when I booked the cabin I asked for a clothes airer. During check in the receptionist advised it would be in the cabin. It wasn't, I was advised it would be included in the next day's housekeeping, it wasn't.  I contacted reception to ask for the clothes airer, I was given one.

Access to Bennett's beach and Jimmy's beach were good. Ten minute walk for both.
Great place to stay easy to access
I guess that Reflections Jimmys Beach is a good holiday park, but the "Tiny Homes" accommodation is seriously overpriced for what it represents.

It was a great spot, park and had great amenitied! Only negative was that wifi literally does not function well and is unsuitable if you have any work from home or even use for surfing we did a speed test multiple times and it wouldnt ever go over 10 mbps…which is abhorrent. Otherwise park is amazing! Walk to either the ocean beach or the bay beach within minutes. Pool was lovely and playgrounds nearby and in park was awesome.
Facilities are nice. The cabins are quite new. There is basically zero phone reception, and the wifi was quite congested while we were there. Bring starlink if you have it.

The campground is in a fantastic location, and the campsites themselves were clean, well maintained, and nicely spaced out. However, the amenities were not as clean as expected. I do understand that it was during school holidays and the park was very busy. Unfortunately, the toilets and showers were closed for cleaning at 8am, which is a peak time for campers. This resulted in people brushing their teeth in the camp kitchen and at campsite taps. I would suggest reviewing the cleaning times to better accommodate busy periods
Fabulous caravan Park, brilliant for dogs and children. Very family oriented and safe. Security of a night time so no drunks and crazy stuff happening.
Staff wonderful and helpful always when you arrive outside office hours.  Fabulous beach locations and I love it. And so pet friendly! It truly is a magical spot.
Awesome place for a holiday

Great location. Stayed in a tiny home. I was expecting cramped conditions and the tiny home looked really nice. It is unfortunate there was not a single hook, shelf or ANYTHING to hang or put a single piece of clothing nor anywhere to dry a towel.... Just be prepared.

Great place awesome amenities.
Safari tent was awesome, it even had aircon.
Kid friendly, maybe too kid friendly with kids riding around the pool and cabin area, it could have ended in tears( should have a designated area for safety for all) on another note, workmen arrived at 730am to start work on some of the cabins including ours with no prior warning from reception at check-in the afternoon before.
So bit of a sore point.
Loved the boom gate technology to enter and exit the park.
Park was situated right near town and walking distance to the beach

2025 Leider schlechtes Wetter gehabt aber immer noch ein schöner wilder Caravan Park. Der Park hat sich auch etwas vergrößert aber die Sanitäranlagen sind gleich geblieben, leider sind diese dann auch zu wenig und immer recht überfüllt.

2019 Wunderbarer Caravan Park direkt in der Wildnis mit ganz vielen einheimischen Tieren. Tolle Strände und Wanderwege sind ganz in der Nähe. Sanitäranlagen sind recht neu und sauber. Wir konnten hier viele verschiedene Vogelarten beobachten und vor allem hören. Auch Dingos und Possums sind auf dem Platz zu finden. Sehr sehr nett.
We loved our 7 night stay in the caravan.  Very dog friendly with excellent amenities. Laundry pay by card with 7 modern washers and lots of clotheslines. Fabulous pool

I miss Jimmys! We arrived home today and I want to go back. Other people will rate the facilities - they're all great. Service, excellent. It's the feeling - the beach, the walks, the township, the sunsets. It's an incredible place to stay.

We stayed here in September and a large tree fell onto our car and caravan, causing major damage. This happened just one week after the park told us their trees had been inspected and were safe. The weather was calm — no wind, no storm — and the tree still came down. Our toddler had been playing in that exact spot only hours earlier. It’s terrifying to think what could have happened.||||To make matters worse, we’ve been left completely unsupported and out of pocket by our insurers. The park has taken no responsibility and their insurer still hasn’t resolved anything after more than three months. We’ve been given no assistance or genuine care, despite being regular visitors (twice a year).||||What shocks us the most is that the park considered the site safe enough to reopen the same day we left with families parked in the exact same designated spot. That tree could have seriously injured or even killed someone. In our opinion, this is a major safety risk and needs urgent attention before someone gets hurt.||||Stay at your own risk. We certainly won’t be back.

We stayed here in September and a large tree fell onto our car and caravan, causing major damage. This happened just one week after the park told us their trees had been inspected and were safe. The weather was calm — no wind, no storm — and the tree still came down. Our toddler had been playing in that exact spot only hours earlier. It’s terrifying to think what could have happened.

To make matters worse, we’ve been left completely unsupported and out of pocket by our insurers. The park has taken no responsibility and their insurer still hasn’t resolved anything after more than three months. We’ve been given no assistance or genuine care, despite being regular visitors (twice a year).

What shocks us the most is that the park considered the site safe enough to reopen the same day we left with families parked in the exact same designated spot. That tree could have seriously injured or even killed someone. In our opinion, this is a major safety risk and needs urgent attention before someone gets hurt.

Stay at your own risk. We certainly won’t be back.

Spent 7 nights here on a powered site.
Spoilt for choice of a surf beach and a bay beach.and an amazing pool.
Dog friendly
Lots of safe cycling areas.
Already booked in for return visit

Have stayed previously in a campervan, and this time just an overnight stay in a cabin. It was clean, well set up and pre-cooled with aircon when we arrived on a hot day. Friendly reception staff and a really nice comfortable cabin, in a great location.
Friendly staff. Great location. Clean facilities. Pool looked awesome. Pet friendly. Cabins looked great too. Would love to come back

The camping area has a net so you camp on top of that. Very clean and convenient.
I found the toilets to be cleaned and smelling good. The place was full and still clean.

The staff working around were very friendly.

Our family really enjoyed our stay at the Reflections Holiday Park at Jimmys Beach!

The location here is nice and quite.  You are a little out of the way, which is great if you want to unwind and relax.  We stayed on a powered concrete site and it was large and well laid out.  There is a nice collection of BBQs and camp facilities which is great.  There are dingos around so just be careful.

The proximity to Jimmys Beach is a big attraction here.  Water is lovely and it’s a fabulous place to walk along in the morning of evening.  I included a couple of beach shots with the review.

The only downside we experienced was that the hand soap in the male toilets didn’t seem to get refilled during our entire stay.  One failed first, the second a day later.  Not sure that’s great form.

Anyways, we would happily stay again, it’s a lovely place!
Great location. Excellent facilities.

We stayed in a cabin - which was basically a hotel room! Short walk to the beach, an incredible pool which the kids loved, and super friendly staff.
Highly recommend!
Great place to stop off forva few days when heading further north or south.  Friendly helpful staff. Easy walk to bay or beach. Lots of bird life

We had a big site and we were lucky enough to have 3 sites next to each other. We were situated near the entrance. Where we were was quiet. The pool was great. We were located near the beach. The amenities were great. The toilet and shower area was large and was clean and tidy. There were other ones in the park. We will be here again.

We had a powered site in the bottom area for our motor home. Our was the second weekend of the school holiday. We only booked 2 days before. I was so surprised to get a spot also 3 other lots of our friends got a spot as well.  We had a brilliant 3.5 days break from work. Swan in the pool and set up on the lake side, for a day of kyacking, stand up boarding, and swimming. It was a perfect day. As usual some dolphins came in pretty close and cruised down the beach to the delight of everyone on the beach. It was about our 4th time their,  booking in again asap for a family trip away. It's also so close from Newcastle, a bit over an hour, easy!  Love Jimmy's Beach.

Great Caravan park and dog friendly. Jimmys Beach is paradise. Some sections of road could do with some upgrading for the kids to bike ride easier but that is literally my only criticism. Will return again.
Great Park good facilities. Can get very busy

The park is fantastic, staff knowledgeable and very friendly, amenities spotless. The only concern was that the toilet/showers doors were constantly locked open, with children around we found this daunting, we did lock close them but when we went back they were locked open again.  Parents did this.|We  will return again.

A fabulous park nestled on the shores of Jimmy's Beach, Hawks Nest.
We stayed in the superior villa which was accessible accomodation.  Could not have asked for more, the villa was fitted out with everything we needed. Will be back again.
Loved it. Perfect location, great for kids, extremely clean common use facilities. IGA is  also a very short walk to which is great because we didn’t have a small car to drive. I will be back.
Great park
We were camping and uncle everywhere was very wet but reception staff were great.

BEAUTIFUL!!! Recently stayed here at Jimmys Beach Reflections, In a cute cosy tiny home which is amongst big beautiful gum trees & other Australian native trees & srubs. The tiny home has nice big windows so you can really open it up & let all the natural light in & enjoy the views of the trees & the birds. Also has a nice little covered outdoor veranda attached. The tiny home is fully equipped with all your basic cooking utensils. Also has a good air conditioning system. The park is very nice & offers a range of different accommodation. Great Pool Area, Camp kitchen with a Tv & Also a big open fire pit for all guest to enjoy. There are some bbq areas throughout the park. Short walking track to jimmy beach. Reception is great you greeted by friendly staff upon arrival & departure. Simple quick & easy check in & check out. Very knowledgeable of the local area for places to go & see & also places to go & eat. Thank you Reflections Jimmys Beach for a nice stay. 🙂👍

I enjoyed my stay very much  -  I booked a comfortable and immaculate tiny house!|Jimmys is in a wonderful location and has welcoming helpful staff … the beach was a short stroll down a bush track and WOW what a beautiful view … I’ll definitely be back here!
Stayed at a campsite so can’t comment on rooms or service. Probably one of the most beautiful beaches on earth, highly recommend watching the sun come up

A great caravan park in a great little town (hope it stays that way!). Jacinta was so welcoming and helpful, loves her hometown. Noel was also good for a long chat!
We did the Yacaaba Headland walk, 2km down the beach & 1km steep climb to fantastic views of the ocean, islands, hinterland & Port Stephens. Such a beautiful spot and I've never seen a beach so free of washed up litter (3 small pieces). Pristine.
Across the bridge Tea Gardens is also lovely with cafes, 2 fat bakers bakery & quiet (mid week & winter) riverfront picnic area.
A must return.
Own caravan. Sites large, fairly flat, nice artificial grass for parking & walking. Amenities blocks super clean and well maintained.

My families and i are here four days June long weekend, not happy with their amenities service (at very back end) was very dirty, the floor is filthy in showers/toilets and not cleaned for the 4 days..
we are very disappointed.

The park was very neat and tidy . . The bathroom facilities were very clean . My only negative. People should be more mindful  of other guest when their dogs bark and bark , and they should always be contained or on their leads . And yes I do like dogs .
Loved the tiny home. Was set in natural surroundings with lots of wildlife. Sound of the waves at night was very relaxing.
Tiny home stay is amazing. Property is clean. There is beach just few minutes walk. Very quiet property to enjoy peaceful weather.

Great coastal holiday spot. I was there for a festival after quite a bit of rain so parts of the grounds were a little flooded but it’s still a very lovely holiday park, with a good sized pool, beach a few minutes away, a lot of beautiful green space and cabins with good facilities.
Terrific part of the world !

Was on site to do some electrical maintenance on one of the permanent cabins.

Good facilities.

Ladies at the front reception were happy and helpful.

We started in our own combi van and the site they gave us was perfect. We enjoyed all the families there. There was so much for them to do. Great safe location. Only down side was we could not walk to the beach but that was ok.

Stayed in a Tiny Home here which was a great alternative to a traditional cabin. The park is a very short stroll from both Bennett & Jimmys beaches and a great spot to spend a weekend away from the busyness of Sydney
Loved it , great place , very tidy , serene setting . Great place to relax

Great camping location for families where you’ll find the amenities routinely cleaned and functioning. Beach is a short walk or optional 4WDing on the beach past the main area.

This is much of a family caravan and camping venue so you should not expect entire quietness throughout the day. On the long weekends, you should book well ahead of time.

Spent one week in a caravan site recently. Had a great stay. There's a beautiful new big pool. It's a short walk to beach/surf club, shops and golf club. There's a nearby road that you can get on to drive onto the beach. A walk up nearby Yacaaba mountain is a nice beach/bushwalk. It's a popular park in a lovely area.
good
Great campground, lots of trees and amenities to make the camping experience better

We stayed in a glamping tent right next to the pool, which was perfect for families with kids. The only downside was that the parking area was a bit far, so we couldn’t park directly next to the tent.

We have been coming here for many years but this year there is an obvious deterioration in the upkeep of caravan sites. Lantarna and lack of watering have taken their toll. Sites are mostly not marked and not numbered. People partying till 1.30 am didn't seem to catch what security there is attention. It's just a bit disappointing given this has been a lovely family park.
It's seems that management are not engaged and frankly don't care. The twin park close by seems to have a lot of money invested but not Jimmy's.  I think the issue is they know they can almost fill the place without too much effort.
Good luck to them but what goes round comes round.
Stayed in superior villas, very clean and modern. Was very comfortable
Great park & staff
Select holiday houses for dog friendly, otherwise it is a very nice and relaxing place to stay
Very relaxing 😎
Great facilities, location, pricing but poor wifi.  the new pool is great, but could do with more shade options

We stayed at Jimmys and found it very good. Shower buildings were cleaned every day and general up-keep. We has a netted ground cover site for our awning to go over was great, Our Caravan was parked on the Sandy plot, being fairly new to caravaning I did have some wood to suppord the jockey Wheel but they sank into the ground , A friendly camper gave us a nice wide block of wood and all was great. So will be better prepared next time. We had a severe weather event mid week and that brought a lot of rain that made a river effect under our van , seemed to only be plot 133 affected. But loved every moment there and highly recomend it.  The beach is a short walk and saw a mother Dolphin and her baby only about 6 meters from the shore. Reception lady very polite and friendy.Well done Jimmys.
Love staying at Jimmy’s. Perfect for young families, with the bay beach so close and a pool if the walk is too much for tired little legs
We had a great time in this well-equipped and clean park, close to a wonderful beach. I will return.

We were there with a Motorhome just one night but the park is really nice and clean. Their staff is very friendly! Jimmy Beach is wonderful and just 2 min. away from the main entrance! Excellent price/value
Love this park

A beaut stay here.... such a great area with peaceful surroundings. The safari tent was amazing. The most comfortable bed, heated up the room before arrival. I wouldn't have left. Winter swims, bushwalks, all very close.

Spent the weekend at Reflections Holiday Park glamping with my friend. No husbands, no kids and no responsibilities. The weather was rainy most of Saturday but eased off a bit in the afternoon. I enjoyed the sound of nature, the ocean in the background, wine, food and good company. A beautiful place and I recommend it to anyone who wants to break away. The only thing that was a downside was the wifi did not work and therefore on the rainy days there was no way to watch Netflix etc. Look forward to returning and bringing the whole family.

Location is amazing. Cabin was so quiet and backing onto forest.
We were in the loft tiny house. We had to sign a waiver in case we hurt ourselves climbing the stairs or ladder to the upstairs that has no bed and just dust. Management should remove the ladder and block off the stairs to refrain from people climbing up there.
The tiny house was interesting and sufficient for our one night stay. It would be a bit cramped for a longer stay. Bed was a bit short for me. I am 177cm tall.
The overhead fan had a lot of dust on it. The air conditioner appeared to be the same. Both are located really high and appear to have not been cleaned for a while.
We had a restful night sleep due to the quiet environment.
Full of drunkin, nosey people. Over crowded. Don’t come here.
Great spot. Lots of nature and different beaches within a close walk. Little village with the basics close by.

Wir haben nun schon viele "Reflections" Campingplätze besucht, dies war leider einer der nicht so schönen. Die Sanitäranlagen waren bei weitem nicht so gut gepflegt wie bei allen anderen. Die Plätze sind sehr ungerade, so dass wir es nicht ausgleichen konnten. Internet gab es nur in unmittelbarer Nähe zur Rezeption und ständig flog man raus. Zu Beginn der Schulferien wurde es hier entsprechend laut und die Kinder machten was sie wollten... Die Lage am Strand half der Bewertung um auf 3 Sterne zu kommen ansonsten war das nur für die Durchreise.

Ich kann nur den Vergleich zu 7 anderen Campingplätzen entlang der Küste machen, sicherlich gibt es noch deutlich schlimmere.

Good park and location. This is a dog friendly park BUT beaches are not. All beaches in the vicinity are "Dogs Prohibited", including Jimmy's Beach & Bennett's Beach. Very disappointing. Talking with some locals, MC council is not dog friendly. There is one beach we found is OK for dogs, Winda Woopa but it's a long walk and we have  noticed lately "nudists" now frequent this beach/location.

The power camping site was great. The place was clean. The people onsite are very friendly and easy to get around. The site bbq, toilets, and showers are great. The beach is walking distance and the shops are as well. Great fishing off the beach and plenty of water activities to do there.
Great spot it's right next to a bay/beach

A friend booked two astro turf sites one for us and one for them for the weekend. On arrival we were given different sites. The sites we were given were literally dust bowls and our site was not flat at all. As we were in tents we all stayed on the one. There seems to be very little care taken for the grounds and in particular these sites. The toilets and showers don't seem to be that old but they are extremely well used and don't really present that well. There seemed to be a few randoms hanging around.... Not sure we will be back.
To loud, 3 nights we stayed 3 nights there was either a rowdy drinking session or emotionally drunk youth trying to sort there love lives out for the entire park to hear. We won’t be back
Beautiful settings,  clean amenities and helpful staff. 👌
At night there is bats poo everywhere

This is the second time staying here, both in our caravan. They have added a lot more since our last stay, including cabins and a pool, which is great. Toilets and showers are kept to a decent standard of cleanliness. Staff are always pleasant good to deal with. The park is  located beside a more open surf beach on one side and the nice calm waters of jimmys Beach in the bay on the other,  the beach access is a bit of a hike but not difficult. The only criticism is the number of large trees. They are continually dropping small sticks and leaves on parked vans and vehicles. This park is well worth a look.

Great place to stay but be aware while booking if you book a tiny house - the 'loft style' houses have dangerous stairs with no railings that they make you sign a waiver for in case anyone gets hurt. Really challenging to keep young ones off of over a long stay. Also, there's no lounge area and only tall stools to sit on, making it hard to relax during downtime. Would recommend the park, but if these things would be a problem definitely specify when booking that you don't want a loft house.

Stayed in one of the newer Tiny Houses and it was perfect. Very clean with a comfy bed, nice linen and towels.
The house also had a Nespresso machine and some pods, a small provision of milk and some Timtams.
Really enjoyed our stay and would recommend the tiny houses.
Annual trip with friends and family. Decent rooms, but location is lovely.
The staff were helpful & friendly, only bug bare is dynamic pricing these days is a way of price gauging but people pay it so….

Great park for kids and adults. Cabins and villas are new and clean. Have swimming pool and playground for kids. You have a coffer truck in the morning at the reception area. Highly recommended this place.
Loved this park

We had an inaugural family gathering and it was amazing. The Premium Cabins around the pool were like 5 star hotel rooms. It is so close to the bay and ocean beaches for exploring on foot and in your 4wd. We have booked to come back next year.
Excellent park with great amenities. The beach is close.
Fantastic park with helpful staff. Very clean Amenities, close to everything
Loved it, we'll be back
One of my favourite holiday spots.
Great place to stay and unwind
Stayed in our van, great spot, family oriented, quiet, fantastic walks, beach, green spaces to picnic , would recommend
Very nice place to getaway.

Such a great spot to getaway with young kids! We've been a couple of times staying in the cabins and have decided to make it an annual family holiday! Facilities are great and very clean. Staff are fantastic - very friendly and only too happy to help 😊
Great place to relax

Great caravan park. We stayed in Tiny Home 4 and loved it. The only downside is it only has bar stools for seating and no sofa. Oh and a loft area we couldn't use. But we still liked it...and it was very clean.
Great campgrounds for families with great amenities. There are lots of dingoes here too so be aware of this.
An amazingly clean and well kept park. The sites were big and everyone was very helpful.  The amenities were also clean, bright and modern.
